title: botrychium minganense
intro: Botrychium minganense, also known as Mingan's rattlesnake fern, is a rare and endangered species of fern belonging to the genus Botrychium. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Botrychium minganense is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
